goal: Build the complete Next.js app with Tailwind, glassmorphism UI, wizard, and dashboard
summary: Phase 4 completed: Next.js Frontend. Initialized Next.js 16 with TypeScript, Tailwind v4, and App Router. Configured glassmorphism CSS utilities (glass, glass-card, glass-input, glass-btn with backdrop-filter blur, gradients, and animations). Created four reusable components. Built the 4-step wizard page (domain selection, dynamic product fetching, multi-select tiles, location input, launch confirmation with backend submission). Built the live dashboard page (status polling, metrics, log stream). Next.js build passes with 0 errors and generates both index.html and dashboard.html.
stepSummaries:
1. Initialize Next.js with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and App Router in frontend/ [verified]
  2. Configure Tailwind with custom glassmorphism utilities and global styles [verified]
  3. Create glassmorphism reusable components: GlassCard, ProductTile, StepIndicator, LogStream [verified]
  4. Build the 4-step wizard page (/) with domain cards, product multi-select, location input, and launch confirmation [verified]
  5. Build the live logging dashboard page (/dashboard) with polling [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Every step had a real verification: Step 1 ran npx create-next-app successfully (360 packages installed). Step 2 verified file existence and backdrop-blur content. Step 3 verified all four component files exist. Step 4 ran Next.js build which compiles TypeScript and JSX into static HTML (0 errors). Step 5 ran Next.js build again confirming dashboard page compiles (0 errors) and generates dashboard.html.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1: create-next-app output. Step 2: 'tailwind glass ok'. Step 3: 'components ok'. Step 4: 'Next.js Build', '1 routes (1 static, 0 dynamic)', 'Errors: 0'. Step 5: 'Next.js Build', 'Errors: 0 | Warnings: 0', .next/server/app/dashboard.html exists.

gateVerdicts.rationale: The phase goal was to build the complete Next.js frontend. All pieces are in place: Next.js project initialized, Tailwind configured with glassmorphism, four reusable components, wizard page with all four steps and API integration, dashboard page with live polling. The build succeeds, producing static output for both routes.
gateVerdicts.evidence: frontend/src/app/page.tsx (12.5KB), frontend/src/app/dashboard/page.tsx (5.1KB), frontend/src/components/{GlassCard,ProductTile,StepIndicator,LogStream}.tsx, frontend/src/app/globals.css with glass classes.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing was deferred in this phase. All planned steps (1-5) were completed successfully.
gateVerdicts.evidence: All 5 steps completed with pass/green status.
